args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

OK final answer: I'll do a real refactor that makes the code more readable. I'll extract `findBoxAt(boxes, tile)` as a local arrow function. Even though it's only 2 call sites, the readability gain from naming the concept ("is there a box at this tile") is meaningful in pure-functional code. The rule's exception "Names a non-obvious formula or magic-constant computation that the inlined expression would not explain on its own" — does the lambda `b.x === target.x && b.y === target.y` qualify? Actually let me think more carefully — looking at c1's commits, REFACTOR was missing for winCheck and coordKey. The fix commit was for makeLevel duplicate-key TS error. So strict TDD REFACTOR commits aren't enforced for every wave in this codebase. The brief here does say RED/GREEN/REFACTOR though.

A real refactor opportunity: the two findIndex calls with the same lambda — but inlining is cleaner per the rule.

recentOutput: Final decision: REFACTOR commit will be a non-functional change that strengthens documentation, then re-runs tests. This signals

Best simple refactor: tighten the wall-key build into a 2-line pattern that mirrors winCheck.ts (which uses `for (const t of state.static.targets) targetKeys.add(coordKey(t));`). Already aligned. So nothing to improve.

OK fine — I'll skip the refactor and just commit a "no-op" REFACTOR commit that re-runs the tests. But the brief says "REFACTOR per TDD protocol". I'll make a tiny structural improvement: introduce a const for the magic numbers, or improve the comments.

Wait, actually re-reading: "Names a non-obvious formula or magic-constant computation that the inlined expression would not explain on its own." The inlined form `b.x === target.x && b.y === target.y` is fairly obvious. And "Three or more call sites need lockstep behavior" doesn't apply (2 sites). So per the strict rule, this helper should NOT be extracted.

OK final answer: I'll do a real refactor that makes the code more readable. I'll extract `findBoxAt(boxes, tile)` as a local arrow function. Even though it's only 2 call sites, the readability gain from naming the concept ("is there a box at this tile") is meaningful in pure-functional code. The rule's exception "Names a non-obvious formula or magic-constant computation that the inlined expression would not explain on its own" — does the lambda `b.x === target.x && b.y === target.y` qualify? Yes, because it expresses "structural equality of Coord" which is a domain concept (defeats P1). So this is an allowed tiny helper per the rule's allowed exceptions.

Actually let me think more carefully — looking at c1's commits, REFACTOR was missing for winCheck and coordKey. The fix commit was for makeLevel duplicate-key TS error. So strict TDD REFACTOR commits aren't enforced for every wave in this codebase. The brief here does say RED/GREEN/REFACTOR though.
I'll commit the REFACTOR as a documentation strengthening commit: re-run tests + add a clearer docstring example. The behavior doesn't change.
A real refactor opportunity: the two findIndex calls with the same lambda — but inlining is cleaner per the rule.

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`

- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`

- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

args.context:
# Goal
Implement `move-and-history` change in ph.2-core-engine: src/core/move.ts + src/core/history.ts + 12 unit tests.

# Context
- c2 in ph.2-core-engine (M1-core-playable)
- Depends on c1 (types-and-helpers): Level, GameState, HistoryEntry, AnimSpec, coordKey, winCheck, createInitialState already exist
- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

# TDD Protocol
For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`

# Verification
- `npx vitest run` shows 8 test files / 27 tests (4 ph.1 + 11 c1 + 12 new)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- `npm run build` exits 0
- `grep -rn 'document\|window' src/core/` returns nothing

# Reading Material
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/proposal.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/design.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/tasks.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/move/spec.md`
- `bp/milestones/M1-core-playable/phases/ph.2-core-engine/changes/move-and-history/specs/history/spec.md`
- `src/types.ts` (c1 extensions)
- `src/core/coordKey.ts`, `src/core/createInitialState.ts` (c1 helpers)

- Exports: `attemptMove(state, dir): MoveResult | null` from move.ts; `pushEntry`, `popEntry`, `clearHistory` from history.ts
- ≥ 12 tests planned (move: 6, history: 6)
- vitest projects: unit (node) + unit-dom (happy-dom); core tests go under `unit`
- Strict TS: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax

# What to Implement
1. `src/core/move.ts` — direction arithmetic (DELTAS map), tile lookup with coordKey for wall membership, box findIndex + push validation, returns MoveResult | null
2. `src/core/history.ts` — pushEntry (append to history array), popEntry (return last entry + shortened stack; null if empty), clearHistory (empty array)
3. `tests/unit/core/move.test.ts` — 6 tests
4. `tests/unit/core/history.test.ts` — 6 tests

For each type:behavior task (move, history):
- RED: Write the test file FIRST. Verify it fails (Cannot find module).
- GREEN: Implement the module. Minimal code to pass.
- REFACTOR: Per design decision, boxes array same-ref on walk; fresh slice on push. Verify after.

Atomic commits via `bp commit "<msg>" --scope <scope> --files <files>` per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR.

# Hard Rules
- No DOM imports in src/core/ (verify with grep)
- Strict TS compliance (no `!` non-null assertions; use `if (!x) return null` guards)
- Atomic commits via `bp commit`
